content:
Truly off-topic: I wrote a little bit of fan fiction about the Vulcan "logic extremists". It would be fun to develop this idea more.

In Star Trek Discovery we heard about the "Logic Extremists", a dissident faction of Vulcans who wanted to leave the Federation. But we didn't learn much about their core beliefs! I've been in T'Karath poring through the historical documents. I can reveal some details. (1/n) https://twitter.com/johncarlosbaez/status/1258475087704895488/photo/1

- John Carlos Baez (@johncarlosbaez)

I wrote a somewhat more detailed history of the Logic Extremists on my diary:

  • Logic Extremists.
I really liked it! :) it feels a very plausible timeline given the premises
